title: Run
description: One row per instrument acquisition run (batch) in the SAHA consortium.

run_id.description: Unique run/batch identifier (e.g. TAP01, EC02, SJJP01, MS01).

platform.description: Spatial omics instrument platform used for this run.

instrument_id.description: Specific instrument serial number or lab-assigned ID.

run_date.description: Date the instrument run started (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD).

panel_name.description: Primary panel used in this run (links to panels.parquet).

n_samples.description: Number of tissue samples processed in this run.

slide_prep_manual.description: NanoString/10x slide preparation manual part number.

qc_summary.description: Free-text QC summary or flag for the run.

s3_raw_prefix.description: S3 URI prefix for all raw data from this run.
